message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #808080
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #808080
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  BoxBorderColor #808080
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

participant "InstallInstalling" as InstallInstalling
participant "PackageInstaller" as PackageInstaller
participant "PackageInstallerService" as PackageInstallerService
participant "InstallingAsyncTask" as InstallingAsyncTask
participant "PackageInstallerSession" as PackageInstallerSession
participant "Handler" as Handler
participant "mHandlerCallback" as mHandlerCallback
participant "PkMS" as PkMS
participant "PkMS.PackageHandler" as PkMS_PackageHandler
participant "PkMS.HandlerParams" as PkMS_HandlerParams
participant "PkMS.InstallParams" as PkMS_InstallParams

InstallInstalling -> InstallInstalling : onCreate()
InstallInstalling -> PackageInstaller : createSession()
PackageInstaller -> PackageInstallerService : createSession()
PackageInstallerService --> PackageInstaller : sessionId
PackageInstaller --> InstallInstalling : sessionId
InstallInstalling -> InstallInstalling : onResume()
InstallInstalling -> InstallingAsyncTask : execute()

activate InstallingAsyncTask
InstallingAsyncTask -> InstallingAsyncTask : doInBackground()

InstallingAsyncTask -> PackageInstaller : openSession(sessionId)
PackageInstaller --> InstallingAsyncTask : Session

InstallingAsyncTask -> PackageInstallerSession : openWrite()
InstallingAsyncTask -> InstallingAsyncTask : doPostExecute()
InstallingAsyncTask -> PackageInstallerSession : commit()

PackageInstallerSession -> Handler : sendToTarget(MSG_COMMIT)
Handler -> mHandlerCallback : handleMessage(MSG_COMMIT)

mHandlerCallback -> PackageInstallerSession : handleCommit()
PackageInstallerSession -> PackageInstallerSession : commitNonStagedLocked()
PackageInstallerSession -> PkMS : installStage()

PkMS -> PkMS_PackageHandler : sendMessage(INIT_COPY)
PkMS_PackageHandler -> PkMS_HandlerParams : startCopy()
PkMS_HandlerParams -> PkMS_InstallParams : handleStartCopy()
PkMS_HandlerParams -> PkMS_InstallParams : handleReturnCode()

PkMS -> PkMS : processPendingInstall()
PkMS -> PkMS : processInstallRequestsAsync()
PkMS -> PkMS : installPackagesTracedLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : installPackagesLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : preparePackageLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : scanPackageTracedLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitPackagesLocked()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitReconciledScanResultLocked()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitPackageSettings()

deactivate InstallingAsyncTask
@enduml
